image_label: test5 - multi-room CAD plan (Russian labels), single floor

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner. x east, y north. Units METERS (10,00 = 10.00 m). Clean line-CAD style on a light SQUARE GRID background. Grid is NOT structure (recognized and ignored, see uncaptured). Rectangular outer; complex interior partitions; left/right dim chains do not sum equal (split/offset interior) -> right-side wall y positions MEDIUM/LOW confidence.

strokes.note: south perimeter wall. Carries bottom window openings (S20, S21).
north perimeter wall. Healed door opening at x~=1.2 (the single door arc, top-left, entry into the 33.1 room). LOW conf on exact location.
south wall of the full-width top room (33.1 m2). y=14.18-3.31.
main vertical spine: left column / center+right. x=3.84 from bottom 3,84 chain.
right-of-center vertical: center 23.4 / right rooms (7.69, 13.2). x~=6.8 MEDIUM conf.
right column: 7.69 (above) / 13.2 (below) divide. y~=8.74 (right chain 2,13 below top). MEDIUM conf.
central room 23.4 has an L-notch at its bottom-right (non-rectangular interior); traced as a polyline. MEDIUM/LOW conf on notch dims.
continues spine down: room 22.3 (left) / room 23.1 (right) bottom band. Already part of S6 line conceptually but lower segment shown distinctly in source.
south window opening (left, room 22.3). z unknown. Parent S1.
south window opening (right, room 23.1). z unknown. Parent S1.

dimensions.note: right sub: bottom (m); right chain sums 14.71 vs left 14.18 — transcribed verbatim, discrepancy is the source's

unknowns_noted: GRID BACKGROUND recognized and NOT traced (the key false-positive trap for this drawing class)
left vs right dim chains sum differently (14.18 vs 14.71) -> the interior is offset/split; right-side wall y positions MEDIUM/LOW confidence; dims transcribed verbatim regardless
central room 23.4 is non-rectangular (L-notch); traced as polyline approx
window z absent (plan-only); only bottom windows clearly drawn
uncaptured_visual_elements: GRID: full-page light square grid background -> recognized as drafting grid, ignored, NOT traced as walls (would be the dominant false-positive otherwise)
no furniture in this drawing (clean CAD) -> nothing furniture-like to exclude
HEALED DOORS (1): single door arc top-left into the 33.1 room (S2, x~=1.2)
WINDOWS: only the bottom (south) wall shows clear window openings (S20, S21); other walls show no glazing in this schematic
